turns.user_message: I've noticed I've been feeling jumpy over tiny things lately. My heart races at the smallest surprise.
That on-edge feeling is sticking around all day now. I feel like I'm just waiting for something bad to happen.
I'm so constantly wound up that I'm starting to think I should talk to someone. It's exhausting to feel this way all the time.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something they noticed about themselves.
